title: Working with a Statistician
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9iy5g","text":"This chapter presents some guidelines for working with a statistician, beginning with when and why you should consult one. We emphasize the importance of good communication between the statistician and the client and the need for clearly defined tasks and a timetable. Other considerations, such as security, confidentiality, and business arrangements are discussed.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"h0jys","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
